mapper.sql:
select ui.college , bi.user_info_user_info_id_1 , bi.create_time , bi.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 , bi.purpose , bi.booking_date , bse.status_name , bi.booking_info_id , bi.end_time , ui.student_id , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ci.room_number , ci.qr_code_path , bi.start_time , ui.password , ci.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 , ui.registration_date , ui.major , ui.name , bi.booking_status_enum_booking_status_enum_id_1 , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 , ui.phone_number , bi.time_period
FROM booking_info bi left join user_info ui on bi.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id left join classroom_info ci on bi.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 = ci.classroom_info_id left join booking_status_enum bse on bi.booking_status_enum_booking_status_enum_id_1 = bse.booking_status_enum_id
mapper.select:
select ui.college , bi.user_info_user_info_id_1 , bi.create_time , bi.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 , bi.purpose , bi.booking_date , bse.status_name , bi.booking_info_id , bi.end_time , ui.student_id , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ci.room_number , ci.qr_code_path , bi.start_time , ui.password , ci.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 , ui.registration_date , ui.major , ui.name , bi.booking_status_enum_booking_status_enum_id_1 , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 , ui.phone_number , bi.time_period
FROM booking_info bi left join
user_info
ui on bi.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id left join
classroom_info
ci on bi.classroom_info_classroom_info_id_1 = ci.classroom_info_id left join
booking_status_enum
bse on bi.booking_status_enum_booking_status_enum_id_1 = bse.booking_status_enum_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
